description: Lifts two cards from pending-vision status to live frontmatter-wired status in baby-dbgt.md. Both cards completed vision+trivia enrichment and were explicitly named as 'pending wave 51 vision (will wire here on enrichment)' in the node body. Promoted to appears_on: list; characters: ['baby-dbgt'] added to both cards' frontmatter; body text rewritten from pending to wired with full canonical citations (Dr. Myuu as Baby's bootstrap-paradox-created creator turned puppet; Luud as Baby's energy-extraction god-machine constructed by Myuu). No new narrative claim made — node body already documented the wires; this is the structural completion the node was waiting on.
citations: [CBR: 'Dragon Ball GT's Baby Created Dr. Myuu Oddity, Explained as Simply as Possible' 2022]
